=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Leavanny
|type1=Bug
|type2=Grass
|img=Burgh Leavanny.png
|img_size=200px
|epnum=BW018
|epname=Sewaddle and Burgh in Pinwheel Forest!
|vajp=Chiaki Takahashi
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Leavanny}} debuted in ''[[BW018|Sewaddle and Burgh in Pinwheel Forest!]]'', when {{AP|Sewaddle}} is accidentally attached to a {{p|Deerling}} and then thrown into a raging river. When Ash jumps in after it, Burgh sends Leavanny out and tells it to use {{m|String Shot}}, which saves them from falling over a waterfall. It later fashioned leaves to place on the head of Sewaddle after its last head-cover had been ruined by the Deerling and the river.

In ''[[BW023|Battling For The Love of Bug-Types!]]'', it battled Ash's Swadloon and won easily. It later disabled {{AP|Pikachu}} with String Shot and dominated the battle until Pikachu used Leavanny's {{m|Leaf Storm}} to cut free from the threads and bombarded it with all of his attacks.

Leavanny was seen in a flashback in ''[[BW074|Battling the Leaf Thieves!]]'', when Ash's Swadloon evolved into a Leavanny and started making similar head-covers as Burgh's Leavanny.

It also reappeared in a flashback in ''[[BW103|Certain Up, Unova League!]]''.

Leavanny's known moves are {{m|String Shot}}, {{m|Protect}}, {{m|Leaf Storm}}, and {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Dwebble
|type1=Bug
|type2=Rock
|img=Burgh Dwebble.png
|img_size=200px
|epnum=BW023
|epname=Battling For The Love of Bug-Types!
|vajp=Kiyomi Asai
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc={{p|Dwebble}} was the first Pokémon that Burgh chose to battle Ash in ''[[BW023|Battling For The Love of Bug-Types!]]''. It defeated [[Ash's Tepig]] easily, but was knocked out by Ash's Sewaddle after losing its protective shell. Burgh says that its shell is much lighter than a normal Dwebble's, making it more agile.

Dwebble's known moves are {{m|Dig}}, {{m|Protect}}, {{m|X-Scissor}}, and {{m|Rock Wrecker}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Burgh
|pkmn=Whirlipede
|type1=Bug
|type2=Poison
|img=Burgh Whirlipede.png
|img_size=200px
|epnum=BW023
|epname=Battling For The Love of Bug-Types!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc={{p|Whirlipede}} was the second Pokémon that Burgh chose to battle Ash in ''[[BW023|Battling For The Love of Bug-Types!]]''. It put up a hard fight against {{AP|Sewaddle}}, and its {{m|Solar Beam}} caused him to evolve. Despite the [[type]] advantage, Whirlipede was defeated by Ash's newly evolved Swadloon after it was knocked on its side.

Whirlipede's known moves are {{m|Poison Sting}}, {{m|Steamroller}}, {{m|Iron Defense}}, and {{m|Solar Beam}}.}}
